all.en: This is a friendly reminder that the corporate tax filing deadline is approaching.
all.zh: 此為善意提醒：公司稅申報截止日即將到來。

all.en: All required returns must be submitted no later than April 30.
all.zh: 所有應申報文件須於四月三十日前提交。

all.en: The deadline applies to both federal and applicable state tax obligations.
all.zh: 此期限同時適用於聯邦稅及相關州稅義務。

all.en: Please ensure that all supporting documentation has been gathered in advance.
all.zh: 請確保所有佐證文件已事先彙整完成。

all.en: Required items include income statements, expense ledgers, and depreciation schedules.
all.zh: 必要項目包含損益表、費用分類帳及折舊明細表。

all.en: Payroll tax forms must be reconciled with the general ledger before submission.
all.zh: 薪資稅表單須與總帳對帳一致後方可送出。

all.en: Departments should provide receipts and contracts for major capital expenditures.
all.zh: 各部門應提供重大資本支出的收據與合約。

all.en: Foreign subsidiaries are reminded to complete their respective transfer pricing reports.
all.zh: 提醒海外子公司完成各自的移轉訂價報告。

all.en: Estimated tax payments for the first quarter are due on the same date.
all.zh: 第一季預估稅款亦同日繳納到期。

all.en: If you anticipate any underpayment, please consult the tax department immediately.
all.zh: 若預期可能短繳，請立即聯絡稅務部門。

all.en: Late filings can incur penalties of up to 5 percent per month of unpaid tax.
all.zh: 逾期申報每月可能產生最高百分之五的未繳稅款罰款。

all.en: Interest will also accrue on any outstanding balances until full settlement.
all.zh: 任何未清餘額在全額繳清前亦將計息。

all.en: Employees claiming reimbursable business expenses should submit requests by April 15.
all.zh: 申請可報銷商務費用的員工應於四月十五日前提出申請。

all.en: This will allow the finance team enough time to update the relevant accounts.
all.zh: 此舉可讓財務團隊有足夠時間更新相關科目。

all.en: Tax certificates from banks and brokers should be uploaded to the shared folder.
all.zh: 銀行及券商提供的稅務憑證應上傳至共用資料夾。

all.en: Please name files using the format vendor name underscore document type.
all.zh: 請以供應商名稱底線文件類型的格式命名檔案。

all.en: Inconsistent file names slow down review and create unnecessary errors.
all.zh: 檔名不一致會拖慢審查並造成不必要的錯誤。

all.en: Our external tax advisor will conduct a preliminary review next week.
all.zh: 我們的外部稅務顧問將於下週進行初步審查。

all.en: Department heads will be asked to confirm completeness of submitted information.
all.zh: 將要求各部門主管確認所提交資訊的完整性。

all.en: Final returns will be reviewed by the chief financial officer before filing.
all.zh: 最終申報書將於送件前由財務長覆核。

all.en: Electronic submission will be used for all eligible forms this year.
all.zh: 今年所有可電子申報之表單將採用電子送件方式。

all.en: Please direct any questions to the tax team mailbox at tax@company.com.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問，請寄至稅務團隊信箱 tax@company.com。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your timely cooperation during this busy season.
all.zh: 感謝您在此繁忙期間的及時配合。

all.en: Together we can ensure a smooth, accurate, and compliant filing process.
all.zh: 讓我們齊心確保申報過程順利、準確且合規。

all.en: A pre-filing workshop will be held on April 8 to address common questions from finance leads.
all.zh: 四月八日將舉辦申報前工作坊，以解答財務主管的常見問題。

all.en: Topics include new deduction rules, digital asset reporting, and updated state filing thresholds.
all.zh: 主題包括新扣除規則、數位資產申報及更新後的州別申報門檻。

all.en: Each business unit must designate a primary tax liaison to coordinate document submission.
all.zh: 每個業務單位須指定一名主要稅務聯絡人協調文件提交。

all.en: The tax team has prepared a checklist to help reviewers track completion across categories.
all.zh: 稅務團隊已備妥檢核表，協助審查者追蹤各類別的完成情形。

all.en: Please be aware that paper submissions will no longer be accepted by most jurisdictions.
all.zh: 請注意大多數轄區將不再接受紙本申報。

all.en: Electronic signatures must be applied using the corporate e-signature platform only.
all.zh: 電子簽章僅得透過企業電子簽章平台使用。

all.en: Any retroactive adjustments must be flagged in writing to the controller before April 22.
all.zh: 任何追溯性調整須於四月二十二日前以書面方式向財務主計通報。

all.en: We strongly encourage early submission to allow time for unexpected reviews or corrections.
all.zh: 強烈鼓勵提早送件，以預留時間因應突發審查或修正。

all.en: Following this year's filing, a debrief session will be held to capture process improvements.
all.zh: 本年度申報結束後將召開檢討會議，蒐集流程改善建議。

all.en: Your diligence and attention to detail are essential to maintaining our strong compliance record.
all.zh: 您的勤勉與對細節的關注對於維持我們良好的合規紀錄至關重要。
